title: Dark GUI
description: Dark mode gui for modern minecraft versions
body:
# Dark GUI – Minimal Dark Mode Interface

Version: 1.20+  
Resolution: 16x  
Category: GUI / Interface  
Style: Dark Mode, Minimal, Vanilla Friendly

---

## Description

Dark GUI replaces Minecraft’s bright default menus with a clean and modern dark interface. The pack keeps the familiar vanilla layout while introducing a minimal black and dark gray design that improves readability and reduces eye strain.

It is designed for players who prefer a darker aesthetic without changing the overall feel of Minecraft. All menus, containers, and interface elements are adjusted to create a consistent dark theme while remaining simple and functional.

Dark GUI works well for long play sessions, night gameplay, PvP, building, and general survival worlds.

---

## Features

• Complete dark GUI overhaul  
• Dark inventory, crafting, chest, and menu interfaces  
• Minimal and modern design that stays close to vanilla  
• Improved icon contrast for better visibility  
• Supports Minecraft 1.20+ interfaces  
• Compatible with OptiFine, Fabric, Sodium, and most mods  
• Lightweight 16x resolution with no performance impact

---

## Why Use Dark GUI

Minecraft’s default interface is very bright, especially during nighttime gameplay. Dark GUI provides a darker alternative that is easier on the eyes while keeping menus clear and readable.

This pack is ideal for players who want a simple dark mode UI without changing textures, items, or blocks.

---

## Screenshot

![SHOWCASE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a28ecaccfdc40f69492d7706c82a3929792a5d3f.png)

---

## Installation

1. Download the .zip file  
2. Move the file into the following folder:

.minecraft/resourcepacks

3. Open Minecraft  
4. Go to Options → Resource Packs  
5. Enable Dark GUI

---

## Compatibility

Minecraft 1.20+  
OptiFine / Fabric / Forge / Sodium  
Compatible with most resource packs

---
